zh.Berrynarbor, Devon, Eng: 英國英格蘭戴文貝利納波爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua於1453年出生在西班牙時，她的父親Pedissqua23歲，母親Oricia Arice Avice23歲。她於1482年與Thomas Berry在英國英格蘭戴文貝利納波爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1493年在英國戴文貝利納波爾享年41歲。

zh-hans.Berrynarbor, Devon, Eng: 英国英格兰戴文貝利納波爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua于1453年出生在西班牙时，她的父亲Pedissqua23岁，母亲Oricia Arice Avice23岁。她于1482年与Thomas Berry在英国英格兰戴文貝利納波爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1493年在英国戴文貝利納波爾享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

nameMeanings.name: Margarette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretha
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

nameMeanings.name: Regina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin vocabulary word meaning ‘queen’. It was occasionally used as a given name among the early Christians; a St Regina , probably of the 3rd century, was venerated as a virgin martyr at Autun from an early date. In modern use it is normally borne by Roman Catholics in allusion to the epithet Regina Coeli ‘Queen of Heaven’, a cult title of the Virgin Mary since the 8th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.
The marriage of Prince Ferdinand of Aragon and Princess Isabella of Castille.
Christopher Columbus voyage to America was financed by Queen Isabella I and her husband, Ferdinand II of Aragon.
The Muslims of Granada were defeated.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua was born in 1453, in Spain, her father, Pedissqua, was 23 and her mother, Oricia Arice Avice, was 23. She married Thomas Berry in 1482, in Berrynarbor, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1493, in Berrynarbor, Devon, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua est née en 1453, à Espagne, son père, Pedissqua, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Oricia Arice Avice, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Berry en 1482, à Berrynarbor, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1493, à Berrynarbor, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua 1453 in Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pedissqua 23 und ihre Mutter Oricia Arice Avice 23. Sie hat 1482 in Berrynarbor, Devon, England, United Kingdom Thomas Berry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1493 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Berrynarbor, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua è nata il nel 1453 nel Spagna, sua padre, Pedissqua, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Oricia Arice Avice, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Berry nel 1482, nel Berrynarbor, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1493, nel Berrynarbor, Devon, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiquaが1453年にスペインで生まれた時，父Pedissquaは23歳，母Oricia Arice Aviceは23歳であった。1482年にイギリスイギリスデボンバーリナルボルでThomas Berryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1493年にイギリスデボンバーリナルボルで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua(이)가 1453년 스페인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pedissqua(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Oricia Arice Avice(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1482년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 베리나르볼에서 Thomas Berry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1493년 영국 데폰 베리나르볼에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua nasceu em 1453, em Espanha, seu pai, Pedissqua, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Oricia Arice Avice, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Berry em 1482, em Berrynarbor, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1493, em Berrynarbor, Devon, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua родилась в 1453 г. в местности Испания, её отцу по имени Pedissqua было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Oricia Arice Avice, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Berry в 1482 г. в местности бирринарбор, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1493 г. в местности бирринарбор, девон, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Margarette Regina Pedissiqua nació en 1453, en España, su papá, Pedissqua, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Oricia Arice Avice, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Thomas Berry en 1482, en Berrynarbor, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1493, en Berrynarbor, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
